# zendesk_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk group by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the group. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the group. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `deleted` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `is_public` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
